name_en: 《Milk White》Export Product! 🚩🚩🚩 Chanel 25B Clover Series Love 💕 Mailer Bag! Really don't miss this ✨ Square and rectangular shape; HAAs calfskin 🐂 with sand gold texture is full ✔️ Clover medal 🏅 pendant has a strong vintage feel! The overall style is very "academia" 🤩 Strong vintage retro feel 👜 Sweet and cool yet retro! Whether handheld or shoulder carried, it's a styling essential! 3653 Size: 16.5×25× 8.5cm
